input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Generated tests should use the relocated shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson APIs from parquet-jackson rather than adding unshaded Jackson dependencies.

The existing failure around JacksonAnnotationIntrospector enum annotation behavior appears to be caused by Jackson 2.19 behavior/version drift, so local Gradle and native-image runs should validate the corrected assertion or coverage path.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: parquet-jackson 1.16.0 is a self-contained shaded Jackson artifact with no runtime service, Docker, or external dependency requirement; the reported failure is a version-sensitive test expectation, not missing setup.
